title: My Very Big Create ModPack
description: This modpack is a very very VERY large modpack, containing 150+ mods (subject to change).
body:
# Welcome!

This is the **"My Very Big Create Modpack!"** This modpack contains 150+ mods for your Create Mod experience. Have Fun!

This Modpack is made to contain (almost) every (allowed) create mod addon. It is a very large pack (as said before like 15 times), and it aims to provide the ~~laggiest~~ best create mod experience you could possibly want.

A github repo will come soon for bug reporting (I will need it with this many mods).

New Create Mod Addons will be added to this modpack as well, but I will not update the create version until all my mods are supported (plus a couple extra not allowed on modrinth I like to play with).

I play with this modpack regularly, so I will find some bugs, but play the betas so we can find all of them.

<details>
<summary>Warning</summary>

This Modpack is not for LOW END COMPUTERS. 
Although I put a TON of optimization mods, it runs forge. THERE WILL BE LAG ON LOWER END PCs!


</details>
<details>
<summary>Notice</summary>


I am not affiliated with Create Mod or any of the addons present in this modpack. I am just a dude in his living room making this. This modpack could not exist without the Create Mod and I give a huge thanks to the create mod team.

</details>
